generated_oml:
instance ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external room temperature, range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box temperature 1, range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box temperature 2, range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2DataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalRoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time external room temperature measurement with timestamp"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal box temperature measurement 1 with timestamp"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal box temperature measurement 2 with timestamp"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for thermal incubator, dimensions 214×214×3 mm"
]

instance AirflowFan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan with airflow rate 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance ControllerRaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller unit"
]

instance PCBInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control and signal decoupling"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system regulating internal temperature regardless of external environmental conditions"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, AirflowFan, ControllerRaspberryPi, PCBInterface, PowerSupply, ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (AMQP protocol) for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance PythonScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares solver and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code and community verification"
]

instance OneWireBusEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration for thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedParametersInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OptimizationInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection based on model-derived predictions of physical twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance CalibratedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for thermal models"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for safety monitoring"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimization"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection insights from model-derived predictions"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decisions on control adjustments triggered by safety or performance threshold violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan activation) via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which executes actions using bang-bang control logic with parameters UL (upper limit), LL (lower limit), H (heating duration), and C (waiting duration) to regulate temperature."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi) facilitating communication between low-level driver (PT interaction), controller (bang-bang logic), and simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT sensors/actuators and DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') where deployed physical twin is continuously monitored and simulated using integrated models to support real-time decision-making and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through temperature uniformity experiments (Section 4.1) and residual error minimization during calibration; Model B shows improved thermal inertia prediction with discrepancies in sensor readings indicating spatial temperature variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (AMQP protocol) for communication between PT components (sensors/actuators) and DT services; 1-Wire bus for sensor data transmission to Raspberry Pi GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for wireless deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation, though no specific cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols are detailed."
]
